message:
feat(convoy): add gt convoy land command for owned convoy cleanup (gt-myofa.4)

Add a new 'land' subcommand to gt convoy that provides caller-side cleanup
for owned convoys. This is the equivalent of the witness/refinery merge
pipeline but for caller-managed lifecycle convoys.

The command verifies the convoy is owned (gt:owned label), checks all tracked
issues are closed, cleans up associated polecat worktrees, closes the convoy
bead, and sends completion notifications.

Flags: --force (override open issues check), --keep-worktrees (skip cleanup),
--dry-run (preview mode).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
